MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS (TRANSACTION ID # 56655432) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, YI YUNG

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT CHIA-PI TIEN'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS BARRED BY RES JUDICATA THE FACTS, PRIMARY RIGHT, AND DAMAGES SOUGHT IN THE SMALL CLAIMS COMPLAINT AND IN THIS ACTION ARE THE SAME, I.E. EXISTENCE OF A 1-YEAR LEASE, PRE-PAYMENT OF RENT; REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL PAYMENT BY THE DEFENDANT; PLAINTIFF VACATING THE PREMISES AND PAYING EXTRA FOR HER NEW ACCOMMODATIONS. ORDER FOR THE SAME SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: N. WONG; DEPT.501; NOT REPORTED
REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT CHIA-PI TIEN'S MOTION TO AMEND ANSWER IS MOOT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: N. WONG; DEPT.501; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-14-2015 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Mar-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances: The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CHIA-PI TIEN's Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs is GRANTED in the amount of $6,180. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:

Atty. Edward Hung of Wong & Hung, 510-451-2124, appearing for Defendant and moving party Chia-pi Tien. No appearance by Plaintiff.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CHIA-PI TIEN'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings IS GRANTED. Plaintiff's complaint is barred by res judicata The facts, primary right, and damages sought in the small claims complaint and in this action are the same, i.e. existence of a 1-year lease, pre-payment of rent; request for additional payment by the defendant; plaintiff vacating the premises and paying extra for her new accommodations. Order and judgment for the same signed in open court.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Dept.501; Not Reported

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Answer
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:

Atty. Edward Hung of Wong & Hung, 510-451-2124, appearing for Defendant and moving party Chia-pi Tien. No appearance by Plaintiff.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CHIA-PI TIEN's Motion To Amend Answer
IS moot. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Dept.501; Not Reported
